ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that day */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Closing price of the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was declared */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend paid per share */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol associated with the dividend */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date */,
  "annual_dividend_yield" REAL /* Annual dividend yield as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the stock split occurred */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient of the stock split (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol associated with the split */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the portfolio_id in the portfolio table */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the stock_symbol in the stock_prices table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_symbol")
)
